notes: All 11 scenarios were reviewed against the issue acceptance threshold, narrow MDM specialty boundary, out-of-scope rejection quality, and low-confidence escalation behavior.

Scenario coverage includes golden-record design, match and merge controls, survivorship, hierarchy stewardship, publication failure modes, standards-backed recommendations, out-of-scope rejection, and AI-assisted matching escalation.
No unreviewed regressions were identified during local package validation.
